author: omerfirmak
content: <@774033563732541451> , do you think it is worth adding pk hints for 7702 delegations as well?

author: jsign
content:
Ah, sounds like a natural extension of the `public_keys` field in the `StatelessInputs`. I think we could eventually do it, but honestly the recent found gaps in how subtle things can go wrong if we don't do prper testing for any "hints" included in `StatelessInputs` make me doubt about adding more hints without proper justification of the proving impact of any hint-accelerated case to justify risks and testing work.

I think at some point might be useful to measure how much of this is a "prover killer risk" or how much impact has for an avg block and see if it is worth it.
